body.zh-TW: 打 /config --help 就能一次列出所有可改的設定名稱，不用再硬記；設定畫面裡的操作鍵也調整了——Enter 或空白鍵都能切換選中的那一項，Esc 改成「存檔後關閉」（以前是放棄變更），比較不會手滑改了又沒存到。
body.en: Run /config --help to list every setting name you can change, so you don't have to memorize them. The keys inside the settings screen also changed — Enter or Space both toggle the selected setting, and Esc now saves and closes (it used to discard your changes), so you're less likely to lose an edit by accident.

items.original: Added /config --help to list all available shorthand keys for /config key=value. Changed /config toggle behavior: Enter and Space both change the selected setting, and Esc now saves and closes instead of reverting.

title.zh-TW: 更安全：自動執行時攔下危險指令
title.en: Safer auto mode: blocks destructive commands

body.zh-TW: 當你讓 AI 自己動手、不每步問你，它會先攔下那些「一執行就把成果刪光、又救不回」的指令，例如 git reset --hard（丟掉未存檔修改）、git clean -fd（刪光未納管的新檔）、terraform destroy（拆掉雲端設施）。除非你明講要這樣做，否則 AI 不會自己跑。
body.en: When you let the AI act on its own, it now blocks commands that would wipe your work irrecoverably — git reset --hard (drops uncommitted changes), git clean -fd (deletes untracked files), terraform destroy (tears down cloud infra). It won't run them unless you explicitly ask.

items.original: Improved auto mode safety: destructive git commands (git reset --hard, git checkout -- ., git clean -fd, git stash drop) are now blocked when you didn't ask to discard local work, git commit --amend is blocked when the commit wasn't made by the agent this session, and terraform destroy/pulumi destroy/cdk destroy are blocked unless you asked for the specific stack

title.zh-TW: 終端機提問會倒數、時間到自動選預設
title.en: Terminal prompts count down and auto-pick the default

body.zh-TW: Codex 在終端機介面（TUI，文字操作介面）問你「要不要繼續、選哪個」時，如果你離開沒回應，它會開始倒數，時間到就自動採用預設選項，不再卡著乾等你；你一動鍵盤，倒數就暫停，把選擇權交還給你。適合掛著跑、不想每個小提問都跑回電腦前按一下的情況。
body.en: When Codex's terminal UI (TUI, the text-based interface) asks you to confirm or pick something, it now counts down and auto-applies the default if you've stepped away — no more sitting blocked waiting for you. Touch the keyboard and the countdown pauses, handing the choice back. Handy for long unattended runs where you don't want to babysit every small prompt.

items.original: TUI input prompts can auto-resolve after inactivity, with a countdown that pauses on interaction.

title.zh-TW: 外掛市集：找得到別人做的、也找得到自己做的
title.en: Plugin marketplace: find others' plugins and your own

body.zh-TW: Codex 的外掛（plugin，額外加裝的小工具）現在有市集可逛：多了「我自己做的」分類，方便找回自己寫過的外掛；也按你的登入身分給整理好的精選清單，不用在一大堆裡亂翻。被選用的外掛還能依每個對話各自啟用它自帶的 MCP 伺服器（MCP，讓外掛接上外部資料或工具的通道）。
body.en: Codex plugins (add-on tools) now have a browsable marketplace: a new "created by me" category to find plugins you built yourself, plus curated catalogs tailored to how you're signed in, so you're not digging through everything. Selected plugins can also spin up their own MCP servers (MCP = the channel a plugin uses to reach outside data or tools) per conversation.

items.original: Selected executor plugins can activate their stdio MCP servers per thread; plugin discovery also adds a created-by-me marketplace and auth-specific curated catalogs.

title.zh-TW: 大型對話更快、更省記憶體
title.en: Big sessions run faster and lighter

body.zh-TW: 當一段對話用了很多工具、變得又長又重時，Codex 以前會反覆複製請求和歷史紀錄，又慢又吃記憶體。這版把工具搜尋的結果快取起來（cache，把算過的存著重複用）、並省掉那些重複複製，所以工具用很兇的長對話會明顯變順、占用也降下來。
body.en: In long, tool-heavy sessions Codex used to repeatedly copy requests and history — slow and memory-hungry. This release caches tool-search results (cache = keep computed results around to reuse) and cuts the redundant copying, so heavy long-running sessions feel noticeably smoother and use less memory.

items.original: Reduced latency and memory use in large, tool-heavy sessions by caching tool search and eliminating repeated request and history copies.

title.zh-TW: 內建 antigravity_guide：在對話裡直接查官方指南
title.en: Built-in antigravity_guide: official guides inside the chat

body.zh-TW: 新增一個內建技能（skill，預先寫好、隨時可叫用的小工具）叫 antigravity_guide，讓你在對話當下直接拿到 Antigravity 2.0、CLI、IDE、SDK 的參考指南，不用切出去翻文件。卡住時問它一句，就把對應說明貼進來。
body.en: A new built-in skill (skill = a ready-made tool you can call on demand) named antigravity_guide gives you instant, in-context reference guides for Antigravity 2.0, the CLI, IDE, and SDK — no switching out to hunt through docs. Ask when you're stuck and it pulls the relevant guide right in.

items.original: Added `antigravity_guide` builtin skill to provide instant, in-context reference guides for the Antigravity 2.0, CLI, IDE, and SDK.

title.zh-TW: git 提交紀錄畫成 ASCII 線圖
title.en: Git history drawn as an ASCII graph

body.zh-TW: 看 git 提交紀錄時（git log，列出每一次存檔），現在會用文字符號畫出分支線圖（git log --graph），分支怎麼分岔、又在哪裡合併，一眼就看得出來，跟 hg、jj 這些其他版本控制工具的顯示看齊。
body.en: When you view git history (git log = the list of every commit), it now draws an ASCII branch graph (git log --graph), so you can see at a glance how branches split and merge — matching what other version-control tools like hg and jj already show.

items.original: Improved Git integration by enabling ASCII node graphs (`git log --graph`) for visual parity with hg/jj.

title.zh-TW: 修掉權限規則含特殊符號時的無限詢問迴圈
title.en: Fixed an infinite permission-prompt loop with special characters

body.zh-TW: 以前如果你存的權限規則裡含有 $、. 這類在比對時帶特殊意義的符號（regex metacharacter，正規表達式特殊字元），比對會出錯，導致同一個請求一直跳出來問你、卡成無限迴圈。這版把這些符號跳脫處理（escape，告訴程式「這就是字面上的符號、別當特殊用法」）後就修好了。
body.en: Previously, if a saved permission rule contained characters like $ or . that carry special meaning during matching (regex metacharacters), the match could break and the same request would keep prompting you — an infinite loop. This release escapes those characters (escape = tell the program to treat the symbol literally, not specially) and fixes it.

items.original: Fixed permission engine matching bugs by escaping regex metacharacters (like `$` or `.`) in saved rules, preventing infinite prompt loops.
